mapper.select: select id, user_id, plan_id, order_no, member_type, plan_name_snapshot, duration_months, pay_amount, pay_status, grant_status, grant_message, start_time, expire_time, pay_time, grant_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, delete_flag from osh_member_order where order_no = #{orderNo} and delete_flag = 0 limit 1 for update

select order_no as orderNo, plan_name_snapshot as planName, member_type as memberType, duration_months as durationMonths, pay_amount as payAmount, pay_status as payStatus, grant_status as grantStatus, date_format(start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as startTime, date_format(expire_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as expireTime, date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createTime from osh_member_order where user_id = #{userId} and delete_flag = 0 order by create_time desc

select r.role_code as memberType, r.role_name as memberName, r.id as roleId, date_format(ur.expire_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as expireTime, case when ur.expire_time is not null and ur.expire_time > now() then 1 else 0 end as active, case when ur.expire_time is not null and ur.expire_time > now() then timestampdiff(day, now(), ur.expire_time) else 0 end as remainingDays from osh_role r left join osh_user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.id and ur.user_id = #{userId} and ur.delete_flag = 0 where r.role_code = #{roleCode} and r.delete_flag = 0 and r.status = 1 limit 1
select id from osh_role where role_code = #{roleCode} and delete_flag = 0 and status = 1 limit 1
select expire_time from osh_user_role where user_id = #{userId} and role_id = #{roleId} and delete_flag = 0 limit 1 for update
mapper.insert: insert into osh_user_role (user_id, role_id, expire_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, delete_flag) values (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{expireTime}, now(), #{operatorId}, now(), #{operatorId}, 0) on duplicate key update delete_flag = 0, expire_time = #{expireTime}, update_time = now(), update_by = #{operatorId}
mapper.update: update osh_member_order set pay_status = 1, pay_time = #{payTime}, update_time = now() where order_no = #{orderNo} and delete_flag = 0

update osh_member_order set grant_status = 1, grant_message = null, start_time = #{startTime}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, grant_time = #{grantTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and grant_status != 1
update osh_member_order set grant_status = 2, grant_message = #{grantMessage}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
